title: Buttermilk Roasted Tofu Feast
description: A tangy and fluffy festive Australian dish featuring buttermilk as the key flavor enhancer for a plant-based feast.

ingredients.name: Buttermilk
ingredients.notes: Regular buttermilk or any plant-based alternative

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: For the glaze, optionally use agave nectar if you're vegan

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Extra-virgin olive oil or any neutral-flavored plant-based alternative

instructions: Drain and press the tofu to remove excess liquid, then cut it into chunks.
Mix buttermilk with minced garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper, and dried thyme (if using). Marinate the tofu for at least 1 hour or overnight in the refrigerator.
Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Lightly grease a baking dish with olive oil. Arrange marinated tofu chunks on the dish, ensuring they are not touching each other.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown and crispy around edges. Serve warm with your choice of side dishes like roasted vegetables or a simple green salad.
